languages.text: "Проктор Антар просил передать, что он и его арбитры сойдут на Футфоле, чтобы продолжить расследование. Также он попросил еще раз поблагодарить вас за спасение и заверил, что сообщит маршалу о вашей бесценной помощи".

"Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."
languages.original_text: "Проктор Антар просил передать, что он и его арбитры сойдут на Футфоле, чтобы продолжить расследование. Также он попросил еще раз поблагодарить вас за спасение и заверил, что сообщит маршалу о вашей бесценной помощи".

traits.locale_text: "Proctor Anthar has requested to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall in order to continue their investigation. He also asked to thank you again for rescuing his squad and assured that the Marshal will be told about the invaluable assistance you provided."

He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

"Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

languages.text: "Proktor Anthar bat mich, Euch mitzuteilen, dass er und seine Arbitratoren auf Footfall von Bord gehen werden, um ihre Untersuchung fortzusetzen. Überdies möchte er Euch noch einmal für die Rettung seines Trupps danken und versichert Euch, dass der Marschall von Eurer wertvollen Unterstützung erfahren wird."
languages.original_text: "Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

traits.locale_text: "Proktor Anthar bat mich, Euch mitzuteilen, dass er und seine Arbitratoren auf Footfall von Bord gehen werden, um ihre Untersuchung fortzusetzen. Überdies möchte er Euch noch einmal für die Rettung seines Trupps danken und versichert Euch, dass der Marschall von Eurer wertvollen Unterstützung erfahren wird."

languages.text: « Le proctor Anthar m'a demandé de vous informer que ses arbitrators et lui débarqueront à Castel afin de poursuivre leur enquête. Il souhaite également vous remercier une fois encore d'avoir secouru son escouade et vous assure que le maréchal entendra parler de l'aide inestimable que vous leur avez fournie. »
languages.original_text: "Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

traits.locale_text: « Le proctor Anthar m'a demandé de vous informer que ses arbitrators et lui débarqueront à Castel afin de poursuivre leur enquête. Il souhaite également vous remercier une fois encore d'avoir secouru son escouade et vous assure que le maréchal entendra parler de l'aide inestimable que vous leur avez fournie. »

languages.text: “安萨监察官要求我通知您，他和他的法务官小队将会前往落脚港，以便继续进行调查。他希望能再次向您表达谢意，感谢您拯救了他的小队。他保证会将这一切告知元帅本人，让元帅了解到您提供的宝贵协助。”
languages.original_text: "Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

traits.locale_text: “安萨监察官要求我通知您，他和他的法务官小队将会前往落脚港，以便继续进行调查。他希望能再次向您表达谢意，感谢您拯救了他的小队。他保证会将这一切告知元帅本人，让元帅了解到您提供的宝贵协助。”

languages.text: «El Procurador Anthar me ha pedido que le informe de que sus Arbitrator y él desembarcarán en Paso para poder continuar su investigación. También quería que le diera las gracias por rescatar a su gente y asegurarle que el Mariscal se enterará de la valiosa ayuda que les ha proporcionado».
languages.original_text: "Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

traits.locale_text: «El Procurador Anthar me ha pedido que le informe de que sus Arbitrator y él desembarcarán en Paso para poder continuar su investigación. También quería que le diera las gracias por rescatar a su gente y asegurarle que el Mariscal se enterará de la valiosa ayuda que les ha proporcionado».

languages.text: 「アンサール代理人からの伝言です。彼とアービトレイターたちは調査を続けるため、フットフォールで下船します。それから、部隊を救出してくれたことに改めて感謝しているとのことです。あなたの貴重な支援は、必ず将帥に伝えると約束していました」
languages.original_text: "Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."

traits.locale_text: 「アンサール代理人からの伝言です。彼とアービトレイターたちは調査を続けるため、フットフォールで下船します。それから、部隊を救出してくれたことに改めて感謝しているとのことです。あなたの貴重な支援は、必ず将帥に伝えると約束していました」

languages.text: "Üsteğmen Anthar, kendisi ve Yargıcılarının Binliman'da gemiden ayrılarak soruşturmalarını sürdürecekleri bilgisini iletmemi rica etti. Ayrıca mangasını kurtardığınız için bir kez daha teşekkür edip destek sağladığınızı Miralay'a bildireceğini söyledi."
languages.original_text: "Proctor Anthar has asked to inform you that he and his Arbitrators will be disembarking on Footfall so that they might continue their investigation. He also wished to thank you once again for rescuing his squad and sends his assurances that the Marshal will hear of the invaluable assistance you provided."
